# Solar Project New Chat Handoff

## Session Closeout - 2026-07-13

Project: Solar Project 200W
Phase: Phase 1 implementation refinement with blocker-first pre-routing work

## Current Objective

Resume from stale local state safely, clear pre-routing blockers in schematic, and re-run ERC.

## What Was Completed In This Stop Window

1. DEC-005 was closed: STM32G431 selected as Rev 0 controller baseline.
2. STM32 mapping and pin-budget planning was documented:
   - `docs/session-plan-2026-07-10.md`
   - `hardware/mppt/sheet4-sensing-control-wiring-map.md`
   - `docs/decisions-log.md`
   - `hardware/mppt/interface-assumptions.md`
3. Requirements validation and pre-routing planning artifacts were created locally:
   - `hardware/mppt/schematic-notes.md` (validation section update)
   - `hardware/mppt/rev0-component-shortlist-2026-07-10.md`
   - `hardware/mppt/pre-routing-blockers-2026-07-10.md`
4. Handoff chain was refreshed for clean restart:
   - `HANDOFF.md`
   - `SOLAR_HANDOFF_2026-07-13.md`
   - `NEXT_CHAT_PROMPT.md`

## Verified State At Stop

- Rev 0 architecture remains stable (asynchronous buck baseline).
- STM32G431 baseline is now explicit for Rev 0 control planning.
- Pre-routing gate is currently blocked by known net/connectivity issues.
- Local working tree contains intentional uncommitted docs + schematic edits.

## Next Session Actions (In Order)

1. Run `git status --short` and verify local state before making new edits.
2. Exclude KiCad autosave artifact from commits.
3. Open `hardware/kicad/solar-project/Solar Project.kicad_sch`.
4. Fix current-sense net collisions:
   - `SENSE_PV_I` vs `CHG_OUT_POS`
   - `SENSE_BAT_I` vs `BAT_BUS_POS`
5. Fix dangling fault-net ownership/termination:
   - `FAULT_OCP`
   - `FAULT_OVP`
6. Re-run ERC and record dated results in `hardware/mppt/schematic-notes.md`.
7. Commit docs and schematic updates in separate commits.

## Local State At Stop

- Modified:
  - `docs/session-plan-2026-07-10.md`
  - `hardware/kicad/solar-project/Solar Project.kicad_sch`
  - `hardware/mppt/kicad-implementation-checklist.md`
  - `hardware/mppt/schematic-notes.md`
- Untracked:
  - `hardware/mppt/pre-routing-blockers-2026-07-10.md`
  - `hardware/mppt/rev0-component-shortlist-2026-07-10.md`
  - `hardware/kicad/solar-project/_autosave-Solar Project.kicad_sch`

## Rules For Next Session

1. Keep learning-first scope and staged bring-up approach.
2. Avoid committing transient CAD local-state files, especially KiCad autosaves.
3. Keep assumptions explicit and dated in the decisions log and schematic notes.
4. Do not reopen Rev 0 architecture scope; keep synchronous/gate-driver work in Rev 1 backlog.

## First Action Next Session

Read `HANDOFF.md` and `SOLAR_HANDOFF_2026-07-13.md`, then clear pre-routing blockers in the schematic before any new feature work.

## Suggested Prompt For New Chat

Continue in Solar-Project-200w from `SOLAR_HANDOFF_2026-07-13.md`. Start by clearing the pre-routing blockers in `hardware/kicad/solar-project/Solar Project.kicad_sch` (`SENSE_PV_I`, `SENSE_BAT_I`, `FAULT_OCP`, `FAULT_OVP`), run ERC, and update `hardware/mppt/schematic-notes.md` with a dated verification snapshot before starting any new scope.
